about.label: Introduction
about.title: About the Artist
about.subtitle: Face painting is not just drawings. It's professional art with a deep artistic foundation
about.description: Hi! I'm a face painting artist from Lviv. My journey started at art school, where I gained a classical foundation — painting, graphics, composition. At university, I continued pursuing creativity: designing brochures, websites, greeting cards, and stickers for various university projects. Eventually, I realized I wanted to combine my artistic experience with working with children — and my face painting journey began.
about.step1_text: Classical art education: painting, graphics, composition. This is where the foundation for understanding color and form was laid.
about.step2_text: At university, she worked on design for various projects: brochures, websites, greeting cards, stickers. Art school skills found new applications.
about.step3_title: Face Painting — Art at Your Party
about.step3_text: All artistic experience came together in face painting. Every design is a thoughtful composition with attention to details and the child's character.

faq.label: Questions
faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about face painting
faq.q1: What paints do you use? Are they safe for children?
faq.a1: I use exclusively professional hypoallergenic paints certified for use on skin. They are water-based, easily wash off with soap and water, and are absolutely safe even for the youngest. All materials have appropriate quality certificates.
faq.q2: How long does face painting last?
faq.a2: Face painting lasts from 3 to 8 hours depending on the child's activity and weather conditions. It doesn't smudge during normal activity but may gradually wear off during active play or contact with water.
faq.q3: From what age can face painting be done?
faq.a3: Face painting can be done for children from 3 years old. For the youngest, I offer simple and quick designs (5-7 minutes) so the child doesn't get tired. The main thing is that the child wants it and can sit still for a few minutes.
faq.q4: How does the booking process work?
faq.a4: It's simple: fill out the form on the website or contact me through a messenger. I'll clarify the details of your celebration (date, number of children, theme), suggest the optimal format, and confirm the booking. Deposit — 50%.
faq.q5: Do you travel outside of Lviv?
faq.a5: Yes, I work throughout Lviv and can travel outside the city within a 30 km radius. For more distant locations — contact me, we'll discuss the details and possible additional travel fee.
faq.q6: How long does one design take?
faq.a6: A simple design takes 5-7 minutes, medium complexity — 10-15 minutes, complex artistic face painting (full face) — 20-30 minutes. For party planning, I recommend allowing 10 minutes per child.
